resources.string: Could not process media. Please try again.

Open your Gallery, select a photo or video,
tap Share and choose Metadata Randomizer.

Your real GPS, device and date will be
replaced with random fake data.

Sharing in a moment…

Note: if you send as a Photo in Telegram or WhatsApp,
those apps re-compress and strip all metadata.
To verify this app worked, send as File instead.
